name: backend
description: Backend del sistema Centro Técnico Electrónico

scripts.db:seed: powershell -Command "Get-Content scripts/crear_usuarios.sql -Raw | docker exec -i postgres_cte psql -U User_admin -d Centro_Tecnico_Electronico"
scripts.db:check: powershell -Command "docker exec -i postgres_cte psql -U User_admin -d Centro_Tecnico_Electronico -c --% \"SELECT * FROM \\\"Usuarios\\\";\""
scripts.db:hash-fix: powershell -Command "docker exec -i postgres_cte psql -U User_admin -d Centro_Tecnico_Electronico -c --% \"UPDATE \\\"Usuarios\\\" SET contrasena_hash = '$2b$10$L9vMdfSclS7M3.B5I6S9X.8A2Z6iP5l1n5m6n7o8p9q0r1s2t3u4v';\""
